Secure websites use HTTPS certificates. A lock icon or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the official website.

Home

Lieutenant Governor Rachel Hunt

Rachel Hunt is North Carolina's 36th Lieutenant Governor

The lieutenant governor is the second highest elected official in North Carolina and is the only elected official to have powers in both the legislative and executive branches of state government.

Learn more about Lt. Governor Hunt

Lieutenant Governor Rachel Hunt
